text: Like everyone else who makes the mistake of getting older, I begin each day with coffee and obituaries.
author: Bill Cosby

text: The heart of marriage is memories and if the two of you happen to have the same ones and can savor your reruns, then your marriage is a gift from the gods.
author: Bill Cosby

text: Civilization had too many rules for me, so I did my best to rewrite them.
author: Bill Cosby

text: Raising children is an incredibly hard and risky business in which no cumulative wisdom is gained: each generation repeats the mistakes the previous one made.
author: Bill Cosby

text: I cannot understand how the education of this United States of America has been fooled time and time again. Either make it separate but equal or integrate, therefore it will be equal. And it has been separate and unequal.
author: Bill Cosby

text: Sex education may be a good idea in the schools, but I don't believe the kids should be given homework.
author: Bill Cosby

text: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
author: Bill Cosby

text: I don't know the key to success, but the key to failure is trying to please everybody.
author: Bill Cosby

text: If you have no faith, you've lost your battle.
author: Bill Cosby

text: Family is conflict and it's something that we all relate to.
author: Bill Cosby

text: The first-born in every family is always dreaming for an imaginary older brother or sister who will look out for them.
author: Bill Cosby

text: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
author: Bill Cosby
